mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(UPDATE_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') AS UPDATE_TIME FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMANCE_UPDATE_TIME

SELECT SYSNAME AS sysname , PORT AS port, UNIT AS unit, TMPER AS tmper, RXCUR AS rxcur , RXMIN AS rxmin, RXMAX AS rxmax, RXAVE AS rxave, TXCUR AS txcur, TXMIN AS txmin, TXMAX AS txmax, TXAVE AS txave, TO_CHAR(OCRTIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ocrtime FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME = #{ocrtime} ::TIMESTAMP
